creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you.  Nothing is jumping out at me in either dump to explain a stall and your NVM is at a level that seems commonly used.

There are two things I might try but not confident they will do anything for you
1) Disable EEE in case the switch has bugs (loader tunable hw.em.eee_setting=0)
2) There are some changes is 14.2-beta1 that will dump management traffic stats if you are comfortable upgrading, I am still a little skeptical of the BMC interfering with igb0 if you don't have that set to dedicated or disabled in the BIOS
